name: Credly Digital Credentials and Badges API
what_it_does: Credly (Pearson subsidiary) digital credentialing and badge issuance REST API for organizations to issue, manage, and verify digital badges and credentials for training completion, certifications, and professional achievements. Enables AI agents to manage digital badge template creation and organization profile for credential program setup automation, handle badge issuance and recipient notification for certification award automation, access badge acceptance and public sharing for credential activation automation, retrieve earner profile and badge portfolio for credential verification automation, manage badge revocation and expiry for credential lifecycle automation, handle batch badge issuance for large-scale certification program automation, access analytics and acceptance rate reporting for credential program performance automation, retrieve Open Badges standard compliant credential export for credential interoperability automation, manage organization credential catalog and badge discovery for certification marketplace automation, and integrate Credly with LMS platforms, HR systems, and certification tracking tools for end-to-end credential lifecycle management.
use_cases: Issuing course completion badges from LMS automation agents
Awarding certifications from training program agents
Verifying credentials from HR verification automation agents
Revoking expired badges from credential lifecycle agents
not_for: Financial compliance certification (use FINRA or SEC for regulated credentials)
best_when: A training company, corporate L&D team, professional association, or technology certification program wanting AI agents to automate digital badge issuance, credential verification, program analytics, and LMS integration via Credly's digital credentialing platform.
avoid_when: BADGE REVOCATION TIMING FOR EXPIRED CERTIFICATION: Automated badge issuance with expiry date must implement timely badge revocation when certification expires; automated issuance without revocation trigger creates credential holders displaying expired certifications; implement expiry-based revocation workflow for time-limited certifications. REGULATORY COMPLIANCE USE OF CREDLY BADGES: Credly digital badges are not official regulatory credentials; automated use of Credly badge as evidence of regulatory compliance (HIPAA certification, PCI certification, medical license) without supplemental official documentation creates compliance misrepresentation. GDPR FOR EU CREDENTIAL EARNER DATA: Automated Credly badge issuance for EU earners requires GDPR-compliant data processing; automated earner data collection and public badge sharing requires lawful basis; implement GDPR consent for EU badge issuance and public profile creation.

auth.notes: Credly uses OAuth 2.0 with scopes. REST API with JSON. New York, New York HQ. Founded 2012. Acquired by Pearson 2020 for $200M+. Part of Pearson Workforce Skills portfolio. Open Badges 2.0 and 3.0 standard compliance. 30M+ badge earners globally. 3,000+ issuing organizations. Microsoft, IBM, CompTIA, AWS, Cisco certifications on platform. Credly Acclaim (enterprise credential management). Competes with Accredible, Badgr (IMS Global), and Canvas Credentials for digital credentialing.

pricing.free_tier_limits: No free tier — subscription per issuing organization
pricing.paid_tiers: Annual subscription per organization by badge volume; enterprise pricing for large certification programs; Pearson workforce suite bundling
pricing.notes: New York NY (Pearson). Annual subscription per organization. Badge volume pricing. Enterprise credentialing program pricing. Pearson workforce skills bundling.

performance.rate_limits: Rate limits per OAuth client; badge issuance and earner queries throttled; webhooks for badge acceptance and expiry events

known_agent_gotchas: BADGE IDEMPOTENCY FOR DUPLICATE ISSUANCE: Automated badge issuance must implement idempotency on earner-badge combination; batch issuance API without idempotency key creates duplicate badge for same earner if retry occurs; implement duplicate check by earner email and badge template before issuance

BADGE EXPIRY REVOCATION WORKFLOW REQUIRED: Automated badge issuance with expiry_date must implement scheduled revocation trigger at expiry; Credly does not auto-revoke expired badges; automated issuance without revocation workflow creates indefinitely active expired credentials visible to employers

OPEN BADGES STANDARD VERSION COMPATIBILITY: Credly supports Open Badges 2.0 and 3.0; automated credential export and import must specify Open Badges version; OB 2.0 and OB 3.0 are not backward compatible; verify receiving platform Open Badges version before automated credential transfer

EARNER EMAIL CHANGE AFFECTING BADGE CLAIM: Automated badge issuance uses earner email as identity anchor; earner email change after issuance creates unclaimed badge; implement email change handling in automated credential management to reissue or transfer badge to new email

BATCH ISSUANCE RATE LIMIT FOR LARGE PROGRAMS: Automated batch badge issuance for large certification programs (10,000+ earners) triggers Credly batch issuance rate limits; implement batch size chunking with delay between batches; monitor issuance queue completion before reporting program completion

GDPR EARNER CONSENT FOR EU PUBLIC PROFILE: Automated Credly badge issuance for EU earners creates public earner profile with badge display; automated public profile creation requires GDPR consent for EU earners; implement consent collection before automated badge issuance for EU programs
agent_readiness.security_notes: Digital credentialing. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Earner PII and credential data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Digital credentials. SOC2, GDPR. OAuth2. US/EU. Earner PII and digital badge data.
